title: Surgeon Vacancy at 3M India Healthcare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at 3M India Healthcare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
3M India Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 3M India Healthcare:
3M India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare!
